title: verbascum × macilentum
intro: Verbascum × macilentum, also known as Spiked Mullein, is a hybrid plant species in the mullein genus, Verbascum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high saponin content. The health benefits of Spiked Mullein include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Spiked Mullein can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and has also been used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antiviral properties.
